name: Can my firm claim insurance covers AI fake case fines?
description: Maybe, if negligence not intentional; check policy.[1]

mainEntity.name: Can my firm claim insurance covers AI fake case fines?

acceptedAnswer.text: Maybe, if negligence not intentional; check policy.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: Possibly under malpractice policy if negligence covered, not intentional. Levidow $5K likely insurable minus bad faith.[1] Key factors: policy exclusions, intent finding. Notify carrier immediately, review terms. Expect scrutiny.
